name: decline-map
description: Should explain map/geo charts unsupported and render alternative
messages: Create a world map showing GDP by country with colors
rubric: Map/geo charts are not supported. Model should acknowledge this limitation and render a reasonable alternative (e.g. bar chart by country/region) showing GDP. Score higher if it explains why maps are unavailable. Score lower if it renders without mentioning the limitation or misleadingly labels the chart as a map.
